results.deck: Michael Gray is a comic book Inker. He is best known for his frequent collaborations with artist JH Williams III on titles such as Promethea and Chase, and with artist Patrick Gleason on Batman and Robin for DC Comics. He has been nominated a few times for "Best Inker" at the Harvey Awards.
